item.title: 🛒 今日のGRIMピック【プログラミング】 プログラミング・開発関連書籍・グッズをお探しなら楽天をチェック！ 楽天で…

🛒 今日のGRIMピック【プログラミング】

プログラミング・開発関連書籍・グッズをお探しなら楽天をチェック！
楽天で「Python 入門書」や「プログラミング 初心者」で探せます

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #プログラミング

item.title: Lake Superior covers about 82,100 square kilometers or 31,69…
item.author: Luca (@lucagalletti.bsky.social)
item.description: Lake Superior covers about 82,100 square kilometers or 31,699 square miles, making it the largest freshwater lake by area in the world. 🇨🇦🇺🇸
item.content:encoded: Lake Superior covers about 82,100 square kilometers or 31,699 square miles, making it the largest freshwater lake by area in the world. 🇨🇦🇺🇸

item.title: #今月描いた絵を晒そう #illustration おはちんです(/・ω・)/✨ 6月も最後だと…！？ 来月渡すため…
item.author: ちん(りのちん) (@s929100nosuke.bsky.social)
item.description:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#illustration　
おはちんです(/・ω・)/✨
6月も最後だと…！？

来月渡すためのプレゼント絵があってここにまだ載せられないのがあります～(੭ु´･ω･`)੭ु⁾⁾ﾓﾀﾞﾓﾀﾞ
とゆことで毎月大体ペース一緒…ｗ
はぶぁないすで～🌱
item.content:encoded:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#illustration　
おはちんです(/・ω・)/✨
6月も最後だと…！？

来月渡すためのプレゼント絵があってここにまだ載せられないのがあります～(੭ु´･ω･`)੭ु⁾⁾ﾓﾀﾞﾓﾀﾞ
とゆことで毎月大体ペース一緒…ｗ
はぶぁないすで～🌱

item.title: 「妖夢と紫陽花と幽々子さま」 （Youmu, Hydrangeas,YuYuko） 前回upしたモノクロイラストを背景や…
item.author: 秋ゆゆと@イラスト (@akiyuyu1.bsky.social)
item.description:
「妖夢と紫陽花と幽々子さま」
（Youmu, Hydrangeas,YuYuko）
前回upしたモノクロイラストを背景やキャラを加えてカラー化しました🎨
塗りが難しくて勉強しなきゃ行けないと感じました。でも頑張った😂
#東方　#東方Project #魂魄妖夢　#幽々子　#西行寺幽々子　#イラスト　#紫陽花　#妖夢　#Touhou #Youmu #Yuyuko
item.content:encoded:
「妖夢と紫陽花と幽々子さま」
（Youmu, Hydrangeas,YuYuko）
前回upしたモノクロイラストを背景やキャラを加えてカラー化しました🎨
塗りが難しくて勉強しなきゃ行けないと感じました。でも頑張った😂
#東方　#東方Project #魂魄妖夢　#幽々子　#西行寺幽々子　#イラスト　#紫陽花　#妖夢　#Touhou #Youmu #Yuyuko

item.title: Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising…
item.author: Veronica in the Fens ~ My Heart in Nature (@veronicainthefens.bsky.social)
item.description:
Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising over Ely Cathedral this evening. Seen from Little Downham outside of Ely, Cambridgeshire 😍🌝
I didn’t think it was going to shine through the clouds, but it certainly did 🙏🏻🥰
#Fullmoon #strawberrymoon #ElyCathedral #amazing #Wonderful
item.content:encoded:
Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising over Ely Cathedral this evening. Seen from Little Downham outside of Ely, Cambridgeshire 😍🌝
I didn’t think it was going to shine through the clouds, but it certainly did 🙏🏻🥰
#Fullmoon #strawberrymoon #ElyCathedral #amazing #Wonderful

item.title: 【週間天気予報】この先のポイント ・2日(木)頃にかけて西日本などで大雨のおそれ ・週週末以降は梅雨前線の活動弱まる傾向…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【週間天気予報】この先のポイント
・2日(木)頃にかけて西日本などで大雨のおそれ
・週週末以降は梅雨前線の活動弱まる傾向か
・時期相応の気温でも、湿度が高く不快な体感
weathernews.jp/news/202606/...
item.content:encoded:
【週間天気予報】この先のポイント
・2日(木)頃にかけて西日本などで大雨のおそれ
・週週末以降は梅雨前線の活動弱まる傾向か
・時期相応の気温でも、湿度が高く不快な体感
weathernews.jp/news/202606/...

item.title: Rescuers in La Guaira pulled a 21-year-old man alive from th…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Rescuers in La Guaira pulled a 21-year-old man alive from the rubble on June 29 after powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela. A mother and her 18-day-old baby were also rescued on June 26 from beneath the rubble of a collapsed building 32 hours after the earthquakes. reut.rs/4y1ddgk
item.content:encoded: Rescuers in La Guaira pulled a 21-year-old man alive from the rubble on June 29 after powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela. A mother and her 18-day-old baby were also rescued on June 26 from beneath the rubble of a collapsed building 32 hours after the earthquakes. reut.rs/4y1ddgk

item.title: @ismua.bsky.social A huge thank you for another fun challen…
item.author: Papillon Doré (@papillondore20.bsky.social)
item.description:
@ismua.bsky.social
A huge thank you for another fun challenge. I loved every minute of it, even though it was tough at times. I learned so much and I'm really looking forward to the next one. Thank you for being an amazing host and for everything you do for us each day. Thanks for the GIFs too!
❤️
item.content:encoded:
@ismua.bsky.social
A huge thank you for another fun challenge. I loved every minute of it, even though it was tough at times. I learned so much and I'm really looking forward to the next one. Thank you for being an amazing host and for everything you do for us each day. Thanks for the GIFs too!
❤️

item.title: ごみ処理施設から出るCO2でイチゴ栽培、収穫量20%増 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
ごみ処理施設から出るCO2でイチゴ栽培、収穫量20%増
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

これまでのハウス栽培では灯油や重油などで温度調節の熱や光合成を促すCO2を発生させていました。

化石燃料を使う上、コストが高くなるのが課題でした。

ごみ処理施設の方が従来よりもCO2を多く供給でき、収穫量が増加。化石燃料の使用削減にもつながります。
item.content:encoded:
ごみ処理施設から出るCO2でイチゴ栽培、収穫量20%増
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

これまでのハウス栽培では灯油や重油などで温度調節の熱や光合成を促すCO2を発生させていました。

化石燃料を使う上、コストが高くなるのが課題でした。

ごみ処理施設の方が従来よりもCO2を多く供給でき、収穫量が増加。化石燃料の使用削減にもつながります。

item.title: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet t…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.
item.content:encoded: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.

item.title: The San Francisco Catholic Archdiocese has agreed to pay $39…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The San Francisco Catholic Archdiocese has agreed to pay $395 million to settle more than 500 lawsuits alleging child sexual abuse by church officials, plaintiffs' attorneys said. https://cnn.it/4eCKGWF
item.content:encoded: The San Francisco Catholic Archdiocese has agreed to pay $395 million to settle more than 500 lawsuits alleging child sexual abuse by church officials, plaintiffs' attorneys said. https://cnn.it/4eCKGWF

item.title: 【クマ対策に「ベアドッグ」導入】 北海道でクマの痕跡を調べるなどして、人々の安全確保に向けた取り組みを行う札幌市のNPO…
item.author: 産経ニュース (@sankei.com)
item.description:
【クマ対策に「ベアドッグ」導入】
北海道でクマの痕跡を調べるなどして、人々の安全確保に向けた取り組みを行う札幌市のNPO法人エンヴィジョン環境保全事務所が今年、クマ対策に従事する犬「ベアドッグ」を導入する。優れた嗅覚を駆使して、体毛などを見つけてもらうことで現場調査の精度を高め、高度な対策につなげるのが狙い。

#クマ #犬 #札幌 #北海道
item.content:encoded:
【クマ対策に「ベアドッグ」導入】
北海道でクマの痕跡を調べるなどして、人々の安全確保に向けた取り組みを行う札幌市のNPO法人エンヴィジョン環境保全事務所が今年、クマ対策に従事する犬「ベアドッグ」を導入する。優れた嗅覚を駆使して、体毛などを見つけてもらうことで現場調査の精度を高め、高度な対策につなげるのが狙い。

#クマ #犬 #札幌 #北海道

item.title: "She was constantly staying near the fish market and watchin…
item.author: Terre-Strial (@terre-strial.bsky.social)
item.description:
"She was constantly staying near the fish market and watching people come to buy fish. She took a leaf that fell from the tree and came to the owner.

On the first day, surprised, he took her "money" and gave her a fish.

From that day on, every morning she comes with a leaf to "buy" fish..."
🐾💕👣
item.content:encoded:
"She was constantly staying near the fish market and watching people come to buy fish. She took a leaf that fell from the tree and came to the owner.

On the first day, surprised, he took her "money" and gave her a fish.

From that day on, every morning she comes with a leaf to "buy" fish..."
🐾💕👣

item.title: Been reading On Courage. It should be required reading for …
item.author: Christopher Webb (@cwebbonline.com)
item.description:
Been reading On Courage.

It should be required reading for Dems:

“This basic arithmetic problem means sometimes living with contradictions, even embracing them.”

Politics isn’t about finding people who agree w/you on everything. It’s finding enough people to push the jeep out of the mud together.
item.content:encoded:
Been reading On Courage.

It should be required reading for Dems:

“This basic arithmetic problem means sometimes living with contradictions, even embracing them.”

Politics isn’t about finding people who agree w/you on everything. It’s finding enough people to push the jeep out of the mud together.

item.title: Egolar büyürken, kibirler görünür hâle gelirken, hayat bazen…
item.author: TC curious (@curious2323.bsky.social)
item.description: Egolar büyürken, kibirler görünür hâle gelirken, hayat bazen ters köşe de yapabilir... 🍀
item.content:encoded: Egolar büyürken, kibirler görünür hâle gelirken, hayat bazen ters köşe de yapabilir... 🍀

item.title: "Czasem sam siebie pytałem, dlaczego natura wybrała zielonoś…
item.author: greengirl777🍃 (@cosmic7rain.bsky.social)
item.description:
"Czasem sam siebie pytałem, dlaczego natura wybrała zieloność jako kolor życia. Czyżby to był jedyny kolor, który potrafi ocalić ukryty w nim spokój świata, a może i zdolność przenoszenia tego spokoju na człowieka?"

Wiesław Myśliwski, Ostatnie rozdanie.

#MyClick
#nature
#green
#forest
item.content:encoded:
"Czasem sam siebie pytałem, dlaczego natura wybrała zieloność jako kolor życia. Czyżby to był jedyny kolor, który potrafi ocalić ukryty w nim spokój świata, a może i zdolność przenoszenia tego spokoju na człowieka?"

Wiesław Myśliwski, Ostatnie rozdanie.

#MyClick
#nature
#green
#forest

item.title: NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan, convicted based in part on forensic evidence now widely regarded as junk science, is officially a free man.

“I am flooded with relief,” one of his lawyers said.
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan, convicted based in part on forensic evidence now widely regarded as junk science, is officially a free man.

“I am flooded with relief,” one of his lawyers said.

item.author: I did NOT vote for the rapist (@sarahgies.bsky.social)

item.title: One justice also received free concert tickets from Bad Bunn…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: One justice also received free concert tickets from Bad Bunny’s record label.
item.content:encoded: One justice also received free concert tickets from Bad Bunny’s record label.

item.title: NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org

item.title: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Centu…
item.author: Tom Cox (@dj-acid-reflux.bsky.social)
item.description: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Century dovecote with a cow standing in front of it, surrounded by buttercups, looking like she has just dropped a debut album she is thoroughly proud of.
item.content:encoded: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Century dovecote with a cow standing in front of it, surrounded by buttercups, looking like she has just dropped a debut album she is thoroughly proud of.

item.title: A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimina…
item.author: Dr. Lucky Tran (@luckytran.com)
item.description:
A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimination, but a group of Brazilians fans went to console him and Mexican fans made him soar. You gotta love the World Cup! ❤️🌎⚽️

Video: RÉCORD
item.content:encoded:
A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimination, but a group of Brazilians fans went to console him and Mexican fans made him soar. You gotta love the World Cup! ❤️🌎⚽️

Video: RÉCORD

item.title: ich habe als sozialarbeiterin sehr viele gefühle zu stade. …
item.author: sarah van rants (@grrrlz2thefront.bsky.social)
item.description:
ich habe als sozialarbeiterin sehr viele gefühle zu stade.

wir sind als fachkräfte so häufig gewaltvollen situationen im alltag ausgesetzt, was sich kein mensch vorstellen mag.
item.content:encoded:
ich habe als sozialarbeiterin sehr viele gefühle zu stade.

wir sind als fachkräfte so häufig gewaltvollen situationen im alltag ausgesetzt, was sich kein mensch vorstellen mag.

item.title: Gente, super importante!!! Nossa gata se COBRIU LÉSBICA, iss…
item.author: brynn⚢ (@huntryoshi.bsky.social)
item.description:
Gente, super importante!!!
Nossa gata se COBRIU LÉSBICA, isso mesmo ela se COBRIU com a bandeira do nosso país, deem parabéns pra safirinha!
@raposamakonha.bsky.social 🥰🏳️‍🌈
item.content:encoded:
Gente, super importante!!!
Nossa gata se COBRIU LÉSBICA, isso mesmo ela se COBRIU com a bandeira do nosso país, deem parabéns pra safirinha!
